---
title: "Memorable moments"
date: "2025-10-19"
toc: false
fig-cap-location: bottom
fig-align: left
---

This is a collection of my memorable moments.

## 2025-2026

### Spring break (Austin & San Antonio, Texas)

### San Diego, California

### Thanksgiving

![](pic/thnks.jpeg)

### Halloween

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/hallow1.jpeg)

![](pic/hallow2.jpeg)
:::

### Philly trade group seminar

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/arnold.jpg)

![](pic/kortum.png)

![](pic/treb.jpg)
:::

## 2024-2025

### Stanford University

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/stan1.jpg)

![](pic/stan2.jpg)

![](pic/stan3.JPEG)
:::

### San Francisco

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/sf1.jpg)

![](pic/sf2.jpg)

![](pic/sf3.jpg)

![](pic/sf4.jpg)
:::

### Birthday

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/birthday.JPG)
:::

### Spring break (Florida keys)

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/keys1.jpg)

![](pic/keys2.jpg)

![](pic/keys3.jpg)

![](pic/keys4.jpg)
:::


### Chiang Mai, Thailand

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](pic/elephant1.JPG)

![](pic/elephant3.JPG)

![](pic/elephant2.JPG)
:::
